summary: Trait Graph Visualization feature testing COMPLETE. All components working correctly. Backend API returns correct data (27 traits, 81 evidence, 92% confidence, 4 sources). Frontend TraitGraphVisualization component renders in MOJO modal under 'Mira's Intelligence' section. Toggle expands to show Intelligence Sources breakdown (Services: 14, Observations: 8, Direct Input: 4, Mira Chat: 1). Pet Life Pass card verified working. Soul Score showing 63% consistently across dashboard and MOJO modal.
critical_code_review_comments: TraitGraphVisualization.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all key elements
MOJO modal integration is correct - TraitGraphVisualization placed under 'Mira's Intelligence' section (after Soul Profile)
Source breakdown correctly maps: service_outcome -> Services, behaviour_observation -> Observations, direct -> Direct Input, mira -> Mira Chat
Confidence meter shows 92% in green (correct color for >80%)
Added data-testid='mojo-avatar-wrapper' to PetOSNavigation.jsx for better test automation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components render and function correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Trait Graph Visualization is fully implemented and tested. The component is in MojoProfileModal.jsx under 'Mira's Intelligence' section. Click mojo-avatar-wrapper to open modal, then expand 'Mira's Intelligence' to see stats. Click toggle button (data-testid='trait-graph-toggle') to expand source breakdown. API endpoint GET /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/trait-graph returns stats.

mira_intelligence_section_position.position: After Soul Profile section in MOJO modal

soul_score_consistency.note: Soul scores now consistent between dashboard and MOJO modal using personalization-stats API
